# Aspen Montessori House

> A leading Montessori preschool and daycare in Hyderabad, India, offering Toddlers, Pre-Primary, and Daycare programs for children aged 1.5–6 years. Founded in 2016, proudly led by an all-women team following authentic Montessori pedagogy with a 1:7 adult-to-child ratio.

Aspen Montessori House is located at Lanco Hills Private Rd, Manikonda, Hyderabad, Telangana 500089. Contact: +91-7032000862 / aspenmontessorihouse@gmail.com. The school follows the Montessori method with five curriculum areas: Exercises of Practical Life, Sensorial, Arithmetic, Language, and Cultural studies.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://aspenmontessori.in/llms/home.md): Overview of the school, programs, and Montessori philosophy
- [About Us](https://aspenmontessori.in/llms/about.md): Mission, vision, values, milestones, founders, and all-women teaching staff
- [Programs](https://aspenmontessori.in/llms/programs.md): Toddlers (1.5–2.5y), Pre-Primary (3–5+y), and Daycare (1.5–6y) details
- [Gallery](https://aspenmontessori.in/llms/gallery.md): Photos of classrooms, activities, and campus life
- [Summer Camp 2026](https://aspenmontessori.in/llms/summer-camp.md): April 13 – May 8, 2026 enrichment camp for ages 2–8
- [Newsletter](https://aspenmontessori.in/llms/newsletter.md): The Aspen Leaf — news, events, and stories
